name: Chuck Faranda Comet Workflow
description: Optimized for comet imaging with emphasis on preserving coma, ion and dust tails while balancing comet and star detail.

steps.note: Crop only stacking artifacts. Preserve the full extent of the coma and tails.
Remove pedestal conservatively without clipping faint tail structures.
Preferred: AutoBGE. Alternatives: GraXpert AI or VeraLux Nox. Preserve faint ion and dust tails.
Neutralize the background while maintaining natural comet colors.
Preferred: SPCC when appropriate. Verify realistic coma and tail coloration.
Preferred: BlurXTerminator (15–25%) then NoiseXTerminator (light). StarXTerminator is optional if processing separate comet and star stacks. Alternatives: SyQon Parallax and SyQon Prism.
Preferred: Generalized Hyperbolic Stretch using gradual stretches. Protect the bright coma while revealing faint tails.
Increase local contrast gently without clipping the nucleus or faint tails.
Optional. Apply sparingly to emphasize tail structure.
Archive a 16-bit TIFF master before export. If using separate comet/star stacks, archive both intermediate masters.

author: Chuck Faranda
